message:
fix: add rest-pattern to Worker match arms after field removal

The recent removal of decision_seq and replay_hash from
TraceData::Worker (5cf20cf) left two match arms without
rest-patterns (`..`), which would break if new fields are
added later. Add `..` to the Worker destructures in
determinism.rs and state.rs, and reformat the single-line
match arm in determinism.rs to multi-line for readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
